title: Teltonika TSW100 Industrial Unmanaged Switch
description: TSW100 is the first unmanaged industrial switch from Teltonika Networks. It offers 5 gigabit ports, four of which are PoE out 802.3af and 802.3at The total power budget is 120W (30W/port). Power is supplied via an industrial 4-pin connector in the range of 7 - 58V The device features a robust aluminum body and with additional kits, it can be mounted on a DIN rail or flat surfaces Note that TSW100 PoE ports works properly when switch is powered using PSU, which can supply 44-57 VDC. If TSW100 switch is powered with voltages ranging from 7 VDC to 43 VDC, it will work as standard switch, without PoE capabilities POE+: 4 x PoE+ ports with 802.3af and 802.3at support POWER BUDGET: Total power budget at PSE up to 120 W ETHERNET: 5 x Gigabit Ethernet with speeds up to 1000 Mbps MOUNTING: DIN rail and surface mounting options
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power type 4-pin automotive PoE type PoE-Out (only) PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 4 PoE budget [W] 120 Max. power consumption [W] 130 Power via connector/terminal 7 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Design DIN rail, Industry Fans No Chassis design Metal Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 350 Width [mm] 115 Height [mm] 32 Depth [mm] 101
